description.s: Mobile-friendly text editor for Hob expressions. Renders the compact JSON AST via hob-interpreter.prettyPrintAll, edits as plain text in a textarea, and parses back via hob-interpreter.readAll on every input (debounced 200ms). Parse errors are shown inline in a red banner; successful parses fire onChange with the new AST. A Format button reformats the current text. Readonly mode renders a pre block.
Designed for simple reminder expressions. :doc nodes round-trip as (:doc ...) lists — noisy but correct. No autocomplete, no syntax highlighting, no internal Save button.
